$comment: D-CSUBSET-GNU-ATTRIBUTE (TF-C62): GNU `__attribute__((...))` in the AFTER-DECLARATOR position with the widened argument grammar — `format(printf,1,2)` (multi-arg), `__nothrow__,__leaf__` (multi-clause), `__nonnull__((1))` (nested paren), `aligned(4)` (number). This is the shape every real C header uses on its prototypes (glibc `__attribute__((__nothrow__,__leaf__))`, Tcl `TCL_FORMAT_PRINTF(1,2)`). The attributes are parse-and-ignore hints — the program must COMPILE and RUN with them present: add(v,12)+deref(&10)+firstv(0,1,2) = 32+10+0 = 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the after-declarator attrSpec slot in initDeclarator -> the first prototype fails P0009 -> the program no longer compiles (compile failure, not exit 42). The release arm re-witnesses the attributed declarations survive the shipped pipeline.
